verses.text: Rejoice in the Lord; beware of dogs and evil workers; 'we are the circumcision, which worship God in the spirit.' True worship. The real people of God serve in spirit, not in flesh.
Rejoice in the Lord; beware of dogs and evil workers; 'we are the circumcision, which worship God in the spirit.' True worship. The real people of God serve in spirit, not in flesh.
Rejoice in the Lord; beware of dogs and evil workers; 'we are the circumcision, which worship God in the spirit.' True worship. The real people of God serve in spirit, not in flesh.
I had ground to trust in the flesh, a Hebrew, a Pharisee, 'touching the... law, blameless.' Religious credit. He had all the world counts gain.
I had ground to trust in the flesh, a Hebrew, a Pharisee, 'touching the... law, blameless.' Religious credit. He had all the world counts gain.
I had ground to trust in the flesh, a Hebrew, a Pharisee, 'touching the... law, blameless.' Religious credit. He had all the world counts gain.
But what was gain I count loss for Christ; 'I count all things but loss' for the excellency of knowing Him. All for Christ. He gladly forfeits all to gain Him.
But what was gain I count loss for Christ; 'I count all things but loss' for the excellency of knowing Him. All for Christ. He gladly forfeits all to gain Him.
That I be found in Him, having 'the righteousness which is of God by faith,' knowing the power of His resurrection. Christ's righteousness. He rests not on his own, but on God's gift.
That I be found in Him, having 'the righteousness which is of God by faith,' knowing the power of His resurrection. Christ's righteousness. He rests not on his own, but on God's gift.
That I be found in Him, having 'the righteousness which is of God by faith,' knowing the power of His resurrection. Christ's righteousness. He rests not on his own, but on God's gift.
I press 'toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.' Pressing on. He reaches forward, not resting in what is past.
I press 'toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.' Pressing on. He reaches forward, not resting in what is past.
I press 'toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.' Pressing on. He reaches forward, not resting in what is past.
Let us be thus minded; walk by the same rule. One mind. The mature press on together.
Let us be thus minded; walk by the same rule. One mind. The mature press on together.
Many walk as 'enemies of the cross,' whose end is destruction, who mind earthly things. Sad warning. The earthly-minded perish.
Many walk as 'enemies of the cross,' whose end is destruction, who mind earthly things. Sad warning. The earthly-minded perish.
Many walk as 'enemies of the cross,' whose end is destruction, who mind earthly things. Sad warning. The earthly-minded perish.
'Our conversation is in heaven'; Christ shall change our vile body, fashioned like His glorious body. Heavenly hope. We await a transformed, glorious body.
